creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:

====================>>> poudriere STUCK HERE for ever
Manually intervention as follows:
# jexec 10_3i386-default-mybuilder-job-02 csh

In the poudriere building jail two processes have to be killed for not loosing the whole bulk-build.  

====================>>> above shows the problem where build-depends stops
